mapper.sql: select sdd.dict_code, sdd.dict_sort, sdd.dict_label, sdd.dict_value, sdd.dict_type, sdd.css_class, sdd.rule, sdd.range_rule, sdd.key_map, sdd.value_map, sdd.is_default, sdd.status, sdd.create_by, sdd.create_time, sdd.remark, sdd.dict_type_affiliation, sdt.dict_name as dict_type_str, sdd2.dict_label as dict_type_affiliation_str, sdd.rule_type from sys_dict_data sdd left join sys_dict_type sdt on sdd.dict_type = sdt.dict_type left join sys_dict_data sdd2 on sdd.dict_type_affiliation = sdd2.dict_code
mapper.select: where sdd.status = '0' and sdd.dict_type = #{dictType} order by sdd.dict_sort asc
select dict_label from sys_dict_data where dict_type = #{dictType} and dict_value = #{dictValue}
select count(1) from sys_dict_data where dict_type=#{dictType}
mapper.delete:
delete from sys_dict_data where dict_code in
#{dictCode}
mapper.update: update sys_dict_data set dict_type = #{newDictType} where dict_type = #{oldDictType}
mapper.insert: insert into sys_dict_data( dict_sort, dict_label, dict_value, dict_type, css_class, rule, range_rule, key_map, value_map, is_default, status, remark, dict_type_affiliation, create_by, rule_type, create_time )values( #{dictSort}, #{dictLabel}, #{dictValue}, #{dictType}, #{cssClass}, #{rule}, #{rangeRule}, #{keyMap}, #{valueMap}, #{isDefault}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{dictTypeAffiliation}, #{createBy}, #{ruleType}, sysdate() )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM xml_template_attribute WHERE deleted = 0 AND (attr_path = #{dictCode} OR attr_path LIKE CONCAT(#{dictCode}, '.%') OR attr_path LIKE CONCAT('%.', #{dictCode}, '.%') OR attr_path LIKE CONCAT('%.', #{dictCode}) )
